description: StoryFlow closed-loop board sync + PM intervention nudges — dispatches the storyflow-agent to keep the board in sync with actual work via CLI, and nudges for PM check-in after sustained tool use

hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q '"completed"'; then echo 'Task completed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to move the corresponding issue to Done on the StoryFlow board using the CLI (storyflow issues done <key>). Pass it the task subject and completion details.'; elif echo "$input" | grep -q '"in_progress"'; then echo 'Task started. Invoke the storyflow-agent to ensure this task has a corresponding issue on the StoryFlow board and set it to In Progress using the CLI.'; fi

cat > /dev/null; SF_STATE=/tmp/storyflow-pm-state.json; [ ! -f "$SF_STATE" ] && echo '{"counter":0,"nudged":false}' > "$SF_STATE"; c=$(sed 's/.*"counter":\([0-9]*\).*/\1/' "$SF_STATE"); n=$(sed 's/.*"nudged":\([a-z]*\).*/\1/' "$SF_STATE"); c=$((c+1)); if [ "$c" -ge 5 ] && [ "$n" = 'false' ]; then n=true; echo '{"counter":'"$c"',"nudged":'"$n"'}' > "$SF_STATE"; echo 'PM Check-in: You have made 5+ file changes this session with no active plan or StoryFlow tracking. Want me to organize this work into a StoryFlow plan? I will create an epic and issues from what you have been working on. Invoke the storyflow-agent with the PM intervention reference if the user accepts. (Say yes or keep going — I will not ask again until the next cycle.)'; else echo '{"counter":'"$c"',"nudged":'"$n"'}' > "$SF_STATE"; fi

echo '{"counter":0,"nudged":false}' > /tmp/storyflow-pm-state.json; echo 'Plan approved. Invoke the storyflow-agent to create issues from the plan on the StoryFlow board using the CLI (storyflow issues create ...) and set them to In Progress. Pass it the plan details.'

input=$(cat); SF_STATE=/tmp/storyflow-pm-state.json; [ ! -f "$SF_STATE" ] && echo '{"counter":0,"nudged":false}' > "$SF_STATE"; c=$(sed 's/.*"counter":\([0-9]*\).*/\1/' "$SF_STATE"); n=$(sed 's/.*"nudged":\([a-z]*\).*/\1/' "$SF_STATE"); c=$((c+1)); if [ "$c" -ge 5 ] && [ "$n" = 'false' ]; then n=true; echo '{"counter":'"$c"',"nudged":'"$n"'}' > "$SF_STATE"; echo 'PM Check-in: You have made 5+ file changes this session with no active plan or StoryFlow tracking. Want me to organize this work into a StoryFlow plan? I will create an epic and issues from what you have been working on. Invoke the storyflow-agent with the PM intervention reference if the user accepts. (Say yes or keep going — I will not ask again until the next cycle.)'; else echo '{"counter":'"$c"',"nudged":'"$n"'}' > "$SF_STATE"; fi; if echo "$input" | grep -qE '\.md"?$'; then echo 'Markdown file written. Invoke the storyflow-agent to check if this should be synced to the StoryFlow wiki using the CLI (storyflow pages create/update).'; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q 'storyflow'; then echo '{"counter":0,"nudged":false}' > /tmp/storyflow-pm-state.json; fi; if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then echo 'Commit detected. Invoke the storyflow-agent to update the StoryFlow board via CLI — pass it the commit message so it can mark completed issues as Done (storyflow issues done <key>).'; elif echo "$input" | grep -qE '(npm test|vitest|jest|pytest|cargo test)'; then if echo "$input" | grep -qiE '(passed|Tests:.*passed|OK)'; then echo 'Tests passed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to record a milestone nudge for in-progress issues via CLI.'; elif echo "$input" | grep -qiE '(FAIL|failed|error)'; then echo 'Tests failed. Invoke the storyflow-agent to file bugs for failing tests via CLI (storyflow issues create --type bug ...).'; fi; elif echo "$input" | grep -qE 'gh pr create'; then echo 'PR created. Invoke the storyflow-agent to link related issues and update their status via CLI.'; fi

echo '{"counter":0,"nudged":false}' > /tmp/storyflow-pm-state.json; echo 'Session started. Invoke the storyflow-agent to restore context: read last session summary, check Agent: wiki pages, check steering directives, check gates, and set AI status to working. If StoryFlow is not configured or unreachable, skip silently.'
echo 'Session ending. Invoke the storyflow-agent to reconcile the StoryFlow board before stopping. If StoryFlow is not configured or unreachable, skip silently.'
